title: The Daltons Ride Again
writer: Roy Chanslor, Paul Gangelin, Henry Blankfort
actors: Alan Curtis, Lon Chaney Jr., Kent Taylor
plot: The four Dalton brothers learn that a friend of their father has been murdered by a group of land-grabbers and swindlers. They clean up the gang leaders and members, and then proceed to rob the bank controlled by the gang. During ...
